{{Expand}}

{{Infobox concept
| name = Class Two Fiend
| introduced = cradle-11-dreadgod
}}

== Dreadgod ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-11-dreadgod|A [[Class Two Fiend]] can appear from the Void as a twisted mutant serpent large enough to swallow planets.<ref name="cradle-11-dreadgod-c6">''Dreadgod'', chapter 6</ref>}}

== Threshold: Stories from Cradle ==
{{spoiler|book=cradle-13-threshold|Class Two [[Fiends]] are threats worthy of multiple teams.<ref name="cradle-13-threshold-c7">''Threshold: Stories from Cradle'', chapter 7</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

[[Category:Concepts]]
[[Category:Dreadgod]]
[[Category:Threshold: Stories from Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle concepts]]
